<!-- AgenRACI is small and opinionated by design. Keep the role library and
     capability list minimal — flag a gap rather than inventing extra roles. -->

## What gap does this close

<!-- What accountability mistake or workflow friction does this catch/fix? -->

## Proposal

<!-- For a checker rule: what makes a charter pass vs fail?
     For a CLI feature: the exact command/flag and its output. -->

## Why it belongs in v0.1 scope

<!-- AgenRACI writes and checks a charter; it does not enforce anything at
     runtime. Confirm this fits that scope (runtime enforcement is roadmap). -->

## Acceptance / done when

- [ ] Behavior is clearly specified (pass/fail or output)
- [ ] Has a test (one known-good + one known-bad for a rule)
- [ ] `SPEC.md` + `README.md` updated if rule behavior changes
